name: Mocha Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first five ingredients in the top of a double boiler and bring the water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until the chocolate melts completely. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat the powdered egg whites with an electric mixer on high speed until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Carefully fold one-fourth of the egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture.
6. Gently fold in the whipped cream and remaining egg white mixture.
7. Chill the mousse before serving.
